mentions.note: Software/mobile marketing company down 3%; caught in software sector rotation.
Down 41% Q1; former market darling helping game developers monetize; entered year at 45x earnings; vulnerable to AI disruption fears despite solid business fundamentals.
Too much risk; Cramer fears Google competitive entry similar to Trade Desk issue; excellent margins tempt disruption; avoid despite attractive initial setup.
Down 30% in January, crashed 70% Friday on Google Project Genie; AI eating mobile game advertising; compressed from 42x to 32x forward earnings; don't compete with Google.

Mobile advertising software up 108%; 43x earnings but has no real competitor, dominates market; revenue tripled 4 years, EPS $9.37 for 2025 (2x 2024), Wall Street expects 37% revenue and 56% EPS growth.
